  • Method Details

    • checkPreconditions

      private void checkPreconditions()

    • getAddedFreeIdents

      public final FreeIdentifier[] getAddedFreeIdents()
      Description copied from interface: IProofRule.IAntecedent
      Returns the added free identifiers of this antecedent.

      Note : The returned object must not be modified in any way.

      Specified by:
      getAddedFreeIdents in interface IProofRule.IAntecedent
      Returns:
      Returns the addedFreeIdentifiers.

    • getHypActions

      public final List<IHypAction> getHypActions()
      Description copied from interface: IProofRule.IAntecedent
      Returns hypotheses selection information for this antecedent.

      Added hypotheses are selected by default. The hypAction should not contain added hypotheses (simplifier constraint).

      Note : The returned object must not be modified in any way.

      Specified by:
      getHypActions in interface IProofRule.IAntecedent
      Returns:
      Returns the hypAction.

    • getAddedHyps

      public final Set<Predicate> getAddedHyps()
      Description copied from interface: IProofRule.IAntecedent
      Returns the added hypotheses of this antecedent.

      Added hypotheses are selected by default if they are not also in unselected added hypotheses (IProofRule.IAntecedent.getUnselectedAddedHyps().

      The returned collection preserves the order of the elements from the collection used to construct it.

      Note : The returned object must not be modified in any way.

      Specified by:
      getAddedHyps in interface IProofRule.IAntecedent
      Returns:
      Returns the addedHypotheses.

    • getUnselectedAddedHyps

      public Set<Predicate> getUnselectedAddedHyps()
      Description copied from interface: IProofRule.IAntecedent
      Returns the unselected added hypotheses of this antecedent.

      The returned set is a subset of that returned by {link IProofRule.IAntecedent.getAddedHyps().

      No assumption should be made about the order of the elements in the returned collection.

      Note : The returned object must not be modified in any way.

      Specified by:
      getUnselectedAddedHyps in interface IProofRule.IAntecedent
      Returns:
      Returns the unselectedAddedHyps.

    • getGoal

      public final Predicate getGoal()
      Description copied from interface: IProofRule.IAntecedent
      Returns the goal of this antecedent.

      In case the goal is null, the goal of this antecedent is intended to be identical to the goal of the sequent on which the rule is applied. The goal of an antecedent may only be null if the goal of the rule is also null. If this is not the case, the rule is ill formed and will not be applicable for any sequent.

      Specified by:
      getGoal in interface IProofRule.IAntecedent
      Returns:
      Returns the goal.
      See Also:
      • IProofRule.getGoal()

    • genSequent

      Translates this antecedent using the given formula factory.

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the translated antecedent
